note: Zach's Shop Class: a chalkboard corner in the bay. Each lesson = short chalkboard scene + interactive check. Lessons unlock game systems and re-teach on demand (players can always walk back to class). Zach gets dedicated 'teach' sprite states.

lessons.title: Speeds: SFM to RPM
talk: Every material has a surface speed it likes. NOX prints it right on the paperwork.
Diameter goes down, RPM goes up. Same speed at the cutting edge.

lessons.title: Feeds: chip load
lessons.board: F = RPM x FLUTES x CHIP LOAD
talk: Each flute takes a bite. Too thin, it rubs. Too thick, it snaps.
Feed is just bites per minute.

lessons.title: Where the part lives
lessons.board: G54 = PART ZERO   G43 Hn = TOOL LENGTH
talk: Machine zero is the corner of the box. Your part is not there.
G54 says where the part is. G43 says how long the tool is. Skip either and you buy a new spindle.

lessons.title: Know your metal
talk: Aluminum cuts fast and friendly. Stainless fights back.
Order the right alloy for the job, or the job orders you around.

lessons.title: Paper trail
talk: Chemistry, heat lot, properties. That cert follows the part forever.
NOX includes certs. Legacy suppliers make you beg. Aerospace makes you prove.

check.prompt: Aero job. Material arrives with no cert. You...

lessons.title: The handoff
lessons.board: WHAT RAN / WHAT'S NEXT / WHAT'S WEIRD
talk: Three things every handoff needs. What ran, what's next, what's weird.
Night shift can't read your mind. This board is why my shops never eat mystery scrap.

options: 'Op 20 done thru part 47, insert change due ~60'
check.answer: 'Op 20 done thru part 47, insert change due ~60'

zachGraduation: Class dismissed. Now go teach somebody else.
That's how a trade survives — one machinist showing the next.
